title: Xyloid Baked Vietnamese Squid Bun Rieu
description: A buttery and velvety Vietnamese dish featuring squid, this meal prep recipe is perfect for a weeknight dinner, and is shojin-friendly, meaning it is vegetarian and vegan friendly with the omission of the squid and addition of tofu or tempeh.

ingredients.name: squid
ingredients.notes: or substitute with tofu or tempeh for vegan option

instructions: Slice the squid into small pieces and set aside.
Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat and saute the onion, garlic, and ginger until the onion is translucent.
Add the tomato paste and soy sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles and squid to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and dot the top with butter.
Bake for 20 minutes or until the butter is melted and the top is golden brown.
Serve hot over a wooden board.
